title: Advanced Soul Sand
description: This mod make soul sands useful. You can craft tools and armor with it. The tools you craft from it are very powerful. I added new blocks to the game, which is good for decorating. It has no usage. But in the future I will add blocks that have usage. If yo
body:
This mod make soul sands useful. You can craft tools and armor with it. The tools you craft from it are very powerful. I added new blocks to the game, which is good for decorating. It has no usage. But in the future I will add blocks that have usage. If you spot any bugs or glitches, please let me know, and I will try to fix it as soon as possible. Have a good game!


![The main items and blocks in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PFwtdB1q/images/85c4534bced4764f265f4284f74cf4f0d3e90c51.png "The main items and blocks in the mod")
